global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call to action and informative text.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial app with clear pricing and no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ClearLedger' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: App interface screenshot
elements.description: A screenshot of an app interface showing various financial elements, with a clean and modern design.

elements.label: Descriptive text
elements.description: Text that reads 'No hidden fees' in a clear, readable font, emphasizing transparency.

elements.label: Additional information
elements.description: Another line of text providing further details about the app's features, maintaining a professional tone.

elements.label: Product feature
elements.description: A visual representation of a financial product, depicted as a rectangular shape with rounded edges.

elements.label: Feature highlight
elements.description: Text highlighting a key feature of the app, designed to attract user interest.

elements.label: Feature description
elements.description: A brief description of another feature, presented in a concise and engaging manner.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Shop now' in a bold font, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline reads 'Your money, clearer €9.99' in a large, eye-catching font, positioned centrally.

embedding_texts.global_text: ClearLedger, financial app, native format, modern and clean visual style, key elements include a logo, app screenshot, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline, body text in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ClearLedger, Your money, clearer, €9.99, Shop now
